signals.raw: Warsh's nomination revives debates on **monetary dominance** vs. fiscal pressures, but market expectations for Fed rate cuts remain unchanged (June start, two 25bp cuts in 2026).[2]

signals.headline: South Korea exports rose 33
signals.raw: South Korea exports rose 33.9% in Jan 2026 (fastest in 4.5 years), cushioning won decline, but US-Korea trade talks ended without breakthrough (tariffs risk at 25%).[1]
